betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Processor Presses stamp Pure Crystals into Printed Circuits inside the Inscriber. Four types:

Inscriber Calculation Press (material:13)
Inscriber Engineering Press (material:14)
Inscriber Logic Press (material:15)
Inscriber Silicon Press (material:19)

Presses are found in Meteorite chests or duped via an existing press in the Inscriber with Iron Ingots. The Silicon Press is crafted from Printed Silicon + Iron Block. The Name Press (material:21) is crafted from Gold Ingot + Iron Block.

Tip: Locate a meteorite with the Meteorite Compass for your first set of presses. Duplicate them for mass production.
